title: Rodent Proofing Services in Old Westbury, NY | $500-$3,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional rodent proofing services in Old Westbury, Long Island. Protect your estate or business from mice and rats. Expert exclusion work. Call for a free quote today!
intro: Old Westbury's prestigious estates and historic properties require superior rodent proofing to maintain their integrity and value. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive rodent exclusion services throughout Old Westbury, protecting homes and businesses from mice, rats, and other unwanted pests. Our expert technicians use proven methods to seal entry points and create long-lasting barriers against rodent infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Old Westbury's unique properties, from grand estates to commercial buildings. Our licensed technicians understand the specific challenges of Long Island's rodent populations and use eco-friendly, effective solutions tailored to your property's architecture and landscape.
localContext: Old Westbury's tree-lined streets, expansive properties, and proximity to wooded areas make professional rodent proofing essential for homeowners near landmarks like Old Westbury Gardens and the SUNY Old Westbury campus. The area's mix of historic mansions, modern estates, and commercial properties along the Jericho Turnpike corridor requires customized exclusion strategies to prevent rodent entry through foundation gaps, roof lines, and utility penetrations.

faqs.question: What does rodent proofing include in Old Westbury homes?
faqs.answer: Our rodent proofing service includes a thorough inspection of your Old Westbury property, sealing entry points with steel wool and caulk, installing door sweeps, screening vents and chimneys, repairing foundation cracks, and securing gaps around utilities. We focus on permanent exclusion methods that keep mice and rats out for years to come.

faqs.question: Why does rodent proofing cost $500-$3,000?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on your property's size, construction type, and the extent of entry points requiring sealing. Smaller homes with minimal access points may cost around $500, while larger Old Westbury estates with multiple structures, extensive foundations, and complex rooflines can reach $3,000. We provide detailed estimates after inspection.

faqs.question: How long does rodent proofing last?
faqs.answer: Professional rodent proofing typically lasts 5-10 years or longer when properly installed. Our materials are designed to withstand Old Westbury's seasonal weather changes and resist gnawing by rodents. We warranty our exclusion work and offer annual inspections to ensure continued protection.

faqs.question: When is the best time for rodent proofing in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: Fall is ideal for rodent proofing as mice and rats seek indoor shelter before winter. However, we provide year-round services in Old Westbury. Spring and summer are also excellent times to address rodent issues before populations grow, especially given the area's proximity to wooded areas and open spaces.
